DiscoveredSession.description: One pre-existing backend session surfaced from disk. Mirrors `la_adapter::DiscoveredSession` plus the daemon-side bookkeeping fields (`backend`, `external_path`, `already_imported`).

external_path.description: Absolute path to the backend's own transcript file (JSONL/JSON). The daemon promises never to mutate it; the import path stores it as a read-only reference (architecture §4.2 双轨).

project_hint.description: Project root hint reported by the backend (if any).

title_hint.description: Backend-provided title or first-line preview (if any).

created_at.description: RFC3339 creation timestamp recorded by the backend. Falls back to the discovery file's mtime when the backend payload doesn't carry one; `None` only when neither could be obtained.

already_imported.description: `true` when the daemon's `sessions` table already contains a row for this `(backend, external_id)`. TUI should grey-out import affordance for these entries.
